creator: beat@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Eric,

Eric Krausser wrote:
> your patch solved this bug, now I can use Lightning again. Thanks!
> I 've tested:
>  * old entries are still there
>  * can create new event
>  * delete event
>  * switch Mail/Calender/Task views

Thanks for testing! I've regenerated the amd64 xpi files for all FreeBSD
versions and uploaded them to the master site. I will commit the port
update once the files are synced to all mirrors.

Beat
